leadText: Heahea Beach (Japanese: カンタイビーチ Kantai Beach) is a location on Akala Island in Alola, located west of Heahea City. It serves as the Akala Surf Spot for Mantine Surf. It only appears in Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon. The beach has connections to Heahea City at both its east and its south. The eastern staircase is blocked by Pyukumuku until the player encounters Sina and Dexio.

sections.title: Mantine Surf
sections.text: Mantine Surf [ edit | edit source ] The player can travel from this beach to other islands' Surf Spots using Mantine Surf if they have visited those locations. The player can travel to the following locations: Melemele Surf Spot: Big Wave Beach Ula'ula Surf Spot: Ula'ula Beach
